scripts.generate: npx rimraf api models api.ts base.ts configuration.ts common.ts index.ts dist && docker run --mount type=bind,src=.,dst=/local openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -g typescript-axios -i /local/swagger.json -o /local/ -p withSeparateModelsAndApi=true,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models,supportsES6=true,withInterfaces=true && npx rimraf .openapi-generator && npm run build
